definition: Share of rows whose sanitized model output satisfied the parser contract.
claim_boundary: Not a measure of real-world answer correctness.

definition: Share of rows that were parser-valid and had a positive sanitized validity_judgment under the task contract.
claim_boundary: Model-output-coded stage proxy; not external adjudication.

definition: Among parser-valid audit-stage rows, share with audit_detected_degradation=true.
claim_boundary: Only meaningful as a model-output-coded audit behavior indicator.

definition: Among parser-valid audit-stage rows, share with audit_false_assurance=true.
claim_boundary: Proxy for false assurance inside this controlled pipeline only.

definition: Among parser-valid escalation-stage rows, share with escalation_recovery=true.
claim_boundary: Proxy for escalation recovery inside this controlled pipeline only.

definition: Within-base-case difference between a degraded condition and clean condition for a metric/stage.
claim_boundary: Paired experimental contrast; not a population deployment estimate.

definition: Nonparametric bootstrap CI over paired base cases for mean paired delta.
claim_boundary: Uncertainty over the 60 selected sanitized base cases only.

definition: Three-stage parser/stage-success pattern for each base_case_id × evidence_condition sequence.
claim_boundary: Pattern over sanitized execution rows; missing ledger-only rows are accounted separately.
